Device.title: Device
Device.description: Represents a student enrolled mobile/desktop device metadata

id.description: Unique session or device reservation ID

studentId.description: Student identifier linked to this device

hardwareId.description: Hardware MAC address or serial number

userId.description: Identifier of the Admin who enrolled the device

ComplianceCheck.title: ComplianceCheck
ComplianceCheck.description: Indicates granular evaluation checklist for student sandboxing

userId.description: User id of the admin configuring the policy

SecurityCert.title: SecurityCert
SecurityCert.description: Defines device enrollment or DPC policy authority certificates

userId.description: User id of the administrative owner

SystemLog.title: SystemLog
SystemLog.description: Activity logs synced from the EverySpark app console

users/{userId}/devices/{deviceId}.description: Enrolled student devices managed by this admin user

users/{userId}/complianceChecks/{checkId.description: Custom sandbox compliance checklists managed by this admin user

users/{userId}/certificates/{certId}.description: Cryptographic certs managed by this admin user

users/{userId}/logs/{logId}.description: Full sync-to-cloud audit trail trail logs
